title: Lastrea demerarana
taxonomy: Lastrea demerarana is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of epipetric fern that grows on rocks and other surfaces. The classification of Lastrea demerarana is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Pteridophyta, Class: Polypodiopsida, Order: Polypodiales, Family: Dryopteridaceae, Genus: Lastrea, Species: L. demerarana. This classification is based on the fern's characteristics and its position within the plant kingdom. Further research may be necessary to confirm the accuracy of this classification.
